API-Key aus der FoxESS Cloud: API key from the FoxESS Cloud portal
Aktualisierungsintervall in Sekunden (Em: Update interval in seconds (Recommended: 60, Minimum: 60, API limit: 1440 calls/day)
Generate daily energy data for the curre: Generate daily energy data for the current week (Monday to Sunday)
Generate monthly energy data for the cur: Generate monthly energy data for the current year (all 12 months)
Generate weekly energy data for the curr: Generate weekly energy data for the current month (all weeks in this month)
Generate JSON tables for daily (current: Generate JSON tables for daily (current week), weekly (current month), and monthly (current year) PV power data for VIS widgets
extended_statistics_info_text: Note on Extended Statistics: These statistics show data for the current day/week/month/year only. For historical data, trend analysis, or extended time ranges, please use additional statistics adapters like iobroker.history or iobroker.influxdb.
Optional: Enter price per kWh for cost c: Optional: Enter price per kWh for cost calculations. Leave empty or 0 to disable price display
Optional starting value for the current: Optional starting value for the current month if the adapter was enabled later
Optional starting value for the current week if the adapter was enabled later
Optional starting value for today if the: Optional starting value for today if the adapter was enabled after production already started
instance_info_text: For an additional inverter, please create a new instance. Only one serial number can be specified per instance.
